---
title: "Projects"

description-meta: "Research projects, grants and collaborations of Sivalingam S M"

page-layout: full


<!-- listing:

  - id: projects

    contents:
      - projects.yml

    type: table

    sort: "started desc"

    page-size: 20

    fields:
      - image
      - title
      - subtitle
      - description
      - funding
      - started
      - ended

    field-display-names:

      title: "Project"

      subtitle: "Sponsor / Collaboration"

      funding: "Funding"

      started: "Start"

      ended: "End"

    grid-item-align: left

    image-height: 60px -->

---

<!-- subtitle: "Research Projects, Grants and International Collaborations" -->

<!--# Research Projects -->

<!-- My research focuses on the development of mathematically rigorous methods in

- Scientific Machine Learning
- Neural Differential Equations
- Physics-Informed Neural Networks
- Fractional Calculus
- Model Predictive Control
- Scientific Computing
- Dynamical Systems
- Numerical Analysis-->

<!-- # Current Projects

:::{#projects}
:::

---  -->

<!-- # Future Research Directions -->

My current long-term research directions include

- Scientific Machine Learning for Engineering Systems
- Neural Operators for Partial Differential Equations
- Learning-Based Robust Model Predictive Control
- AI for Scientific Computing
- Fractional Dynamical Systems
- Digital Twins for Structural Health Monitoring
- Mathematical Foundations of Neural Differential Equations
- Safe and Explainable Scientific Artificial Intelligence

---

# Research Funding

I am interested in collaborating on national and international research proposals under programs such as

- ANRF
- SERB
- CEFIPRA
- BRICS
- Indo-French Research Programs
- Indo-Taiwan Research Programs
- Horizon Europe
- Indo-UK Collaborative Research
- Indo-Japan Collaborative Research

---

# Collaboration

Researchers interested in collaboration in any of the above areas are welcome to contact me.

---

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
